title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXII. Paradoxes.
content:
O that I was where I would be,
        Then would I be where I am not!
        But where I am must be,
        And where I would be I cannot.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXII. Paradoxes."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
